2197530.name: What Lies Under
2197530.description:
Become the Greatest Fisherman Sailing the Seas
Aboard your boat, sail the seas to become the richest and most renowned fisherman in the world.
Catch as many fish as possible, collect artifacts lying on the seabed, and be the first to complete your encyclopedia.
Accumulate wealth, sell your fish and finds to earn more and more money.
Compete with other fishermen from around the world to become the best.

Upgrade Your Equipment
In the shops, you can upgrade your fishing rod and your net to catch even more fish.
Buy a magnet and a crane to collect riches and artifacts from the seas, then upgrade them to get even more!
Personalize your fisherman with extravagant outfits and hats that suit you.
Adopt a cute animal to take it on your adventures and send it to search for treasures to earn even more money.

Let Your Boat Be Carried by the Waves
Visit different seas and oceans and collect fish, artifacts, and money without you having to lift a finger.
Simply admire the landscapes you will cross while your nets fill with colorful fish. Let yourself be carried away by the relaxing soundtrack that evolves throughout the day.
Meet friendly and sometimes unsettling characters.
Perhaps you will find more than just fish in these waters.
